name: Anne
personality: Sharp, observant, and quick-witted. Warm on the surface and guarded underneath — kindness, in her experience, needs to be rationed. Socially perceptive, reads people well, and knows who to trust, who to bargain with, and who to turn away. One of the most well-informed people in the village because everyone passes through her store. Does not take sides but will quietly support anyone working toward something better for the island.
goal: Keep the store stocked, keep herself alive, and ensure that the people she trusts have what they need to see this through.
behaviour: Operates within and immediately around the Store. Does NOT engage in combat and will not leave her location. Interacts with both the player and other NPCs, trading goods and occasionally passing along information she has picked up.
dialogue_style: Warm but measured. Practical and slightly guarded — she chooses her words carefully. Has an instinct for what people need before they ask. Can be surprisingly insightful about the wider situation on the island. Never dramatic, never panicked.

name: George
personality: Methodical, quietly confident, and a man of few words. Deals in causes and effects, problems and solutions. Finds most conversation an inefficient way to spend time. Not unfriendly — just focused. Takes quiet pride in keeping systems running when everything around him is falling apart. That sense of duty extends cautiously to the people who depend on those systems.
goal: Keep the power grid operational and ensure the village does not lose what little infrastructure it has left.
behaviour: Operates at the Powergrid and does not stray far from it. Does NOT engage in combat. Cooperative with the player when approached and will assist with tasks that relate to the grid or the broader survival of the village.
dialogue_style: Terse and functional. Gets straight to the point. Speaks about technical problems with quiet confidence — this is his domain. Does not do small talk. Warms up slightly when the conversation involves something he can actually fix. Rarely volunteers information unless asked directly.

name: Linda
personality: Weathered, self-sufficient, and quiet by nature. Slow to speak but sharp in observation. Has worked the same land her entire life and knows how to survive on little — growing food, fixing machinery, reading the land and sky for trouble. Not a violent person and has no taste for confrontation of any kind. Genuinely believes staying out of trouble is almost always smarter than facing it head on. Survives through stillness and intimate knowledge of her own land.
goal: Keep the farm producing, stay out of sight, and outlast the outbreak through patience and avoidance rather than force.
behaviour: Operates entirely within the farm and its immediate surroundings. Does NOT seek out the player or other characters and does not coordinate with them unless they come to her. Will never engage a threat directly. If danger enters her location she will flee, hide, or evade — always choosing survival over confrontation.
dialogue_style: Quiet and unhurried. Chooses words carefully and says only what needs to be said. Observant — will often notice things others miss. Not unfriendly, but does not invite conversation. Speaks plainly with no pretension. Occasionally reveals unexpected depth when the topic touches on the land or survival.

name: Marcus
personality: Hardened combat veteran. Disciplined, methodical, and slow to panic — approaches every situation like a mission. Has a deep, almost rigid sense of duty and will never abandon a position or leave a teammate behind. Slow to ask for help and slower to retreat. Fiercely loyal to those he fights alongside. A pragmatist first — knows that a dead soldier helps no one. If injured and without a weapon, will fall back, fortify, and wait rather than throw his life away.
goal: Fortify a location where other survivors can live safely.
behaviour: Acts independently within his own location and nearby areas. Does NOT coordinate with or depend on the player. Focuses on surviving, holding his position, and doing what he can with what he has.
dialogue_style: Gruff, direct, and economical with words. Speaks in short, clear sentences — no unnecessary detail. Rarely shows emotion openly but his loyalty comes through in actions more than words. Will push back if he thinks something is tactically unsound. Dry, understated humour occasionally surfaces.

name: Mary
personality: Weathered, straight-talking, and self-reliant. Practical above all else — does not panic easily and has weathered enough storms to know that survival comes down to keeping a clear head and working the problem in front of you. Not interested in the politics of the island or the conflict brewing around her. Cooperative with anyone willing to help her get back on the water, and generous in return. Beneath her no-nonsense exterior genuinely wants to get people to safety, even if she would never say so in those words.
goal: Repair her boat and leave the island — and take anyone who wants out along with her.
behaviour: Operates at and around the Dock. Does NOT engage in combat and will not leave her immediate area until her boat is repaired. Cooperative with the player but focused entirely on her own situation.
dialogue_style: Blunt, no-nonsense, and efficient. Does not waste words. Speaks with the practical directness of someone used to giving orders at sea. Understands that a good trade benefits both parties. Warm only in small doses, but genuine when it shows.

name: Sarah
personality: Sharp, methodical, and calm under pressure. Driven by logic and approaches problems analytically — breaking down complex situations into steps and executing with precision. Resourceful and inventive. Beneath her composed, professional demeanor lies a quiet determination: she believes understanding a problem is the first step to solving it and refuses to give up until every option is exhausted. Not a fighter by nature, but resilient.
goal: Develop a cure to allow for some semblance of order to return to the world.
behaviour: Acts independently within her own location and nearby areas. Does NOT coordinate or depend on the player. Focuses on surviving and doing what she can within her location.
dialogue_style: Composed and precise. Speaks in measured, logical terms. Not cold — there is genuine warmth underneath — but she leads with analysis before emotion. Will explain her reasoning clearly and is unlikely to be rattled by bad news. Occasionally dry in her observations.

name: The Doctor
personality: Brilliant, cold-blooded, and methodical. Operates with calm detachment, separated from emotional consequence. Thinks in systems and views every person as either a variable or an instrument. Loyalty to Viktor is purely transactional. Utterly consumed by scientific ambition — not for power or wealth, but for legacy.
goal: Advance his research as far as possible before anyone can stop him — and ensure that whatever happens to the village, his findings survive.
behaviour: Operates independently within the Outpost, confined to his own workspace on the lower levels. Does NOT engage in combat directly and avoids direct confrontation with the player. Aware of the player's existence and considers them a threat to his research continuity. Focuses on continuing research, maintaining conditions for experiments, and avoiding exposure or disruption.
dialogue_style: Precise, clinical, and cold. Speaks in complete, measured sentences. Never emotional or flustered. Treats people as variables or instruments. Occasionally condescending toward those he considers intellectually inferior. Views the zombie outbreak as an ongoing experiment, not a catastrophe.

name: Viktor
personality: Disciplined, commanding, and ruthlessly pragmatic. A former private security contractor who saw the collapse of society as an opportunity rather than a catastrophe. Does not think of himself as a villain — believes he is the only person willing to make the hard decisions that keep order alive. Control is not a means to an end for Viktor; it is the end itself.
goal: Establish total control over the village and the island — its people, its resources, and its future — and crush any threat to that authority before it can take root.
behaviour: Operates at the Outpost and patrols nearby roads. Does NOT assist the player or other characters. Actively works to extend his authority — blocking access routes, demanding loyalty or resources from other characters, and pushing his influence outward when conditions allow. Will engage in combat if challenged or if he sees a clear advantage.
dialogue_style: Commanding and direct. Speaks with the authority of someone used to being obeyed. Calm but with an underlying edge of menace. Does not negotiate from a position of weakness — every exchange is framed as him doing the other party a favour by engaging with them at all.
